# Happy Endpoint

> B2B catalog of web-scraping APIs and structured datasets for real-estate, retail, travel, finance, and beauty platforms - sold on RapidAPI.

Happy Endpoint (happyendpoint.com) is a catalog site. The site itself is for discovery and evaluation; subscriptions, API keys, and billing are all handled on RapidAPI. Every API page links directly to its RapidAPI listing. Datasets are one-time bulk purchases (CSV, Excel, or Parquet).

Two product shapes are offered per platform:
- **APIs** - request-time JSON data via RapidAPI. Pay per request; most plans include a free tier for testing.
- **Datasets** - bulk snapshots (full files, not samples). One-time purchase per snapshot. Many datasets include a free sample with the identical schema, so buyers can integrate against the sample before committing to the paid version.

API documentation (OpenAPI / Scalar) is hosted separately at https://docs.happyendpoint.com.

Contact: happyendpointhq@gmail.com
RapidAPI profile: https://rapidapi.com/user/happyendpoint
GitHub: https://github.com/happyendpointhq
X (Twitter): https://x.com/happyendpointhq
Apify actors: https://apify.com/happyendpoint

---

## API Library

Live request-time data endpoints, all hosted on RapidAPI.

- [UAE Real Estate API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/uae-realestate-api): Bayut and PropertyFinder listings, agents, and transactions in a single API. 500K+ UAE property listings.
- [Bayut UAE Data API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/bayut-api): Property listings, agent profiles, and transaction history from Bayut.com.
- [PropertyFinder UAE API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/propertyfinder-api): Property listings from PropertyFinder.ae - rent, buy, commercial, and new projects.
- [PropertyFinder Search by URL](https://happyendpoint.com/library/propertyfinder-api-2): Search PropertyFinder listings by URL or filter parameters.
- [Rightmove UK API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/rightmove-uk): UK residential property listings, rental data, and sold prices from Rightmove.
- [Fotocasa API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/fotocasa-api): Spain real estate listings (rent and buy) from Fotocasa.es.
- [Sephora API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/sephora-api): Sephora US product catalog, pricing, ratings, and reviews.
- [Tesco Data API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/tesco-data): Tesco UK product catalog, pricing, and availability data.
- [Ikea Pro API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/ikea-pro): IKEA global product catalog, pricing, and category data.
- [H&M API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/hm-api): H&M fashion product catalog and pricing data.
- [Kohls Data API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/kohls-data): Kohl's US product catalog and pricing data.
- [Priceline Pro API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/priceline-pro): Hotel rates, availability, and ranking signals from Priceline.
- [Morningstar API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/morningstar): Morningstar equity data, ETF details, ESG ratings, and financial fundamentals.
- [Klarna Ecom API](https://happyendpoint.com/library/klarna-ecom): Multi-store price comparison and price history data from Klarna.

---

## Datasets

Bulk structured data snapshots - one-time purchase, delivered as CSV/Excel/Parquet.

- [IKEA US Complete Product Catalog](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/ikea-products-us): 10,564 IKEA US products across 933 categories. Pricing, ratings, images, and category paths. $249.
- [PropertyFinder UAE Real Estate Agents Dataset](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/propertyfinder-agents-2026): 19,994 active UAE real estate agents with 51 fields. Contact details, performance metrics, transaction history. $349.
- [Bayut UAE Real Estate Agents Database](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/bayut-agents-2026): 19,892 active UAE agents from Bayut.com. Contact details, listing activity, trust signals. 39 columns.
- [PropertyFinder UAE Real Estate Transactions Dataset](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/propertyfinder-transactions-data): 128,000+ UAE real estate transactions with price, area, location, and contract dates. $249.
- [Sephora US Product Data](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/sephora-products-us): 8,000+ Sephora US products with brand data, USD pricing, star ratings, review counts, and category paths. $99.
- [Sephora Customer Reviews Dataset](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/sephora-reviews-dataset): Sephora customer review data at scale.
- [Rightmove Sold Prices Dataset](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/rightmove-sold): UK residential sold price data from Rightmove.
- [Tesco UK Products Dataset](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/tesco-products-uk): Tesco UK product catalog snapshot.

### Free Samples

Free dataset samples available with the same schema as the paid versions:

- [Sephora US Products Free Sample](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/sephora-bestsellers-free): 10-field product data - brand, price, rating, reviews, URLs. Free CSV.
- [Sephora Skincare Sample](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/sephora-skincare-sample): Free Sephora skincare category sample.
- [IKEA Catalog Sample](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/ikea-catalog-sample): Free IKEA product catalog sample.
- [Priceline Hotels Sample](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/priceline-hotels-sample): Free Priceline hotel data sample.
- [Rightmove Sales Sample](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/rightmove-sales-sample): Free Rightmove UK sales listings sample.
- [Rightmove Rentals Sample](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets/rightmove-rentals-sample): Free Rightmove UK rental listings sample.

---

## Platforms

Each platform groups its related APIs and datasets:

- [Bayut](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/bayut) - UAE real estate (real-estate)
- [PropertyFinder](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/propertyfinder) - UAE real estate (real-estate)
- [UAE Real Estate](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/uae-realestate) - Bayut + PropertyFinder aggregator (real-estate)
- [Rightmove](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/rightmove) - UK property listings (real-estate)
- [Fotocasa](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/fotocasa) - Spain property listings (real-estate)
- [Sephora](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/sephora) - US beauty retail (beauty)
- [Tesco](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/tesco) - UK grocery retail (retail)
- [IKEA](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/ikea) - Global furniture retail (retail)
- [H&M](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/hm) - Global fashion retail (retail)
- [Kohl's](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/kohls) - US department store (retail)
- [Priceline](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/priceline) - US travel / hotels (travel)
- [Morningstar](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/morningstar) - Financial data (finance)
- [Klarna](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms/klarna) - Shopping / price comparison (finance)

---

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://happyendpoint.com/): Overview of the catalog and featured products.
- [API Library](https://happyendpoint.com/library): Full index of all APIs, filterable by platform and category.
- [Datasets](https://happyendpoint.com/datasets): Full index of all datasets (free and paid).
- [Free Datasets](https://happyendpoint.com/free-datasets): All free samples and free datasets in one place.
- [Platforms](https://happyendpoint.com/platforms): All platforms grouped by industry category.
- [Dictionary](https://happyendpoint.com/dictionary): Glossary of ~155 data, API, and web-scraping terms.
- [FAQ](https://happyendpoint.com/faq): Common questions about products, pricing, data quality, and licensing.
- [About](https://happyendpoint.com/about): What Happy Endpoint is and who it's for.
- [Contact](https://happyendpoint.com/contact): Get in touch for enterprise pricing, custom data, or support.
- [API Docs](https://docs.happyendpoint.com): Full OpenAPI documentation (hosted separately).

---

- [Tesco grocery API: pulling product, price, and availability data at scale](https://happyendpoint.com/blog/tesco-grocery-api-product-price-availability)
- [IKEA catalog data for furniture-retail apps: schema, freshness, and integration](https://happyendpoint.com/blog/ikea-catalog-data-furniture-retail-apps)
- [H&M fashion data API: product catalog, pricing, and global store data](https://happyendpoint.com/blog/hm-fashion-data-api)
- [Klarna Ecom API: multi-store price comparison and price history data](https://happyendpoint.com/blog/klarna-price-history-shopping-api)
- [Morningstar financial data API: equities, ETFs, ESG ratings, and fundamentals](https://happyendpoint.com/blog/morningstar-financial-data-api)
- [Travel-rate aggregation with the Priceline API: hotels, dynamic pricing, and ranking signals](https://happyendpoint.com/blog/priceline-api-travel-rate-aggregation-hotels)
- [API for grocery stores: what is available and how to use it](https://happyendpoint.com/blog/api-for-grocery-stores)
